description_long: This is a modern, upholstered chaise with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and a muted gray fabric finish. The backrest and armrests are generously padded, providing a comfortable and inviting seating area. Two large back cushions and two smaller accent pillows, one of which features a subtle leaf pattern, enhance both comfort and visual interest. The chaise sits on four short, slightly tapered metallic legs that elevate it just above the ground, giving it a contemporary look. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric with a smooth texture, while the overall structure suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the padding. This piece would fit well in urban outdoor lounges, parks, or stylish sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern gray upholstered chaise with plush cushions, metallic legs, and a sleek, rectangular design. Features include accent pillows and a soft, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full seat, both back cushions, and two accent pillows, one with a leaf pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right armrest, the back cushions, and the placement of the accent pillows.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and fully upholstered, consisting of two large, loose cushions that provide a plush and supportive surface. There are no visible decorative elements such as tufting or buttons, giving it a clean, modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height of the backrest and featuring the same padded, upholstered finish for a cohesive look.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, slightly tapered, and metallic with a subtle sheen, positioned at each corner for stability and a contemporary touch. They are simple in design, without any ornate detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture. One accent pillow features a subtle leaf pattern, while the rest of the fabric is unpatterned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose back cushions and two smaller accent pillows, one of which is patterned. The cushions are arranged to provide both comfort and decorative appeal, with the accent pillows placed in front of the back cushions.
